creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
The correct man page to add this information to is crypt(3)

The sha512(3) man page is about the hashing algorithm, not the password hashing system.

It may be worth adding a note to sha256(3) and sha512(3) pointing reads to the correct place if they do end up in the wrong place.


See Also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=182518
